observations.combined_conclusion: `dc_fit_rho_xg_pseudocount_025` was run as diagnostic only. It beat champion on 11 folds by log loss and 12 folds by Brier.
observations.pseudocount_conclusion: Best pseudocount row: `txg_xg_pseudocount_025`. It beat the 0.05 reference on 11 folds by log loss and 12 folds by Brier. `0.25` continued the probability-quality improvement, so the saturation boundary did not reverse. However, `txg_xg_pseudocount_025` reduced draw recall from 0.0952 to 0.0000, so it is not the cleanest shadow candidate.
observations.rho_conclusion: Current fitted rho improved on 12 folds by log loss, with 8 max-boundary hits. The wide-grid diagnostic had 2 max-boundary hits and rho max 0.1000. Treat fitted rho as diagnostic unless boundary behavior is stable under future validation.
